infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: VisionAssist needs camera access to describe your surroundings and detect currency.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: VisionAssist uses speech recognition for voice input.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VisionAssist needs microphone access for voice commands.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: VisionAssist can access your contacts to add emergency contacts.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VisionAssist needs your location to send it with emergency alerts.
